headline: Why the $2,000 Social Security Check Hits Harder for Bottom-Half Earners in 2026
summary: For millions of retirees, a single government deposit covers rent, groceries, utilities, and healthcare with nothing left over, which means one claiming decision can separate a dignified retirement from a desperate one.

raw.headline: Why the $2,000 Social Security Check Hits Harder for Bottom-Half Earners in 2026
raw.summary: For millions of retirees, a single government deposit covers rent, groceries, utilities, and healthcare with nothing left over, which means one claiming decision can separate a dignified retirement from a desperate one.

headline: He Lost His White-Collar Job at 54. A $100K Shipbuilding Trade Could Rebuild More Than His Income, It Could Boost His Social Security.
summary: A corporate layoff at 54 sounds like a financial disaster, but a surprising move in the trades could do something most white-collar workers never consider: permanently rewire the Social Security check waiting at the other end.

raw.headline: He Lost His White-Collar Job at 54. A $100K Shipbuilding Trade Could Rebuild More Than His Income, It Could Boost His Social Security.

headline: Bunzl (LSE:BNZL) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift As Analysts Raise Targets
summary: Bunzl’s updated fair value price target of £26.55, compared with the previous £25.82, sits neatly inside a broader Street range that runs from around £26.00 to £30.00. Recent commentary from firms such as JPMorgan, which has a £26.10 target, shows how several analysts are clustering around similar levels while still differing on how much upside they see. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative around Bunzl’s price targets and assumptions matters for your own view of the...

headline: Bernie Sanders Says Trump 'Lied' About 10% Credit Card Rate Cap, Points to Big Banks Making Billions Charging 25-30% Interest Rates
summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt) on Wednesday said President Donald Trump lied about his promise to cap credit card interest rates at 10% while major banks continued to earn billions from consumer lending. Banks Earned Billions From Credit Card Interest In...
